title: The Straw Hats Reach the Ship
description: On pages 14–17, the straw hats reach the ship focuses on Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Usopp as a storm, Smoker, and a mysterious intervention push the Straw Hats out of Loguetown and toward the Grand Line.
scene: On pages 14–17, the straw hats reach the ship focuses on Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Usopp as a storm, Smoker, and a mysterious intervention push the Straw Hats out of Loguetown and toward the Grand Line.

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: out- skirts of the Western Port

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: Why does there have to be a downpour now of all times!?

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: even though I'm supposed to be burning this ship down right now...!

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: This is bad, Richie! We can't start a fire like this!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Chk chk chk chk chk chk chk chk chk chk chk chk chk chk chk ghk!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hey you! Get away from that boat!

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: The lion's still left, you know!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The first time I was in the

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: Jeez, these guys are so persistent.

dialogue.speaker: Alvida
dialogue.text: Should we just stop and fight them off?

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: don't, there'll be no end to them. More importantly, Nami told us to return to the ship as fast as possible.

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: to think that you were RORDOA ZORO! And a pirate at that, too!

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: You intend to take this sword too?

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: You were just toying with me all along!

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: You bastard! What did you do to that lady!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Never thought you were a Marine...

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: I shall take back that Wadou Ichimonji!

dialogue.speaker: Buggy
dialogue.text: That brute dares harm a lady!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The waves are crashing higher and higher!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Are they still not back yet?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I wonder if they're all right?

summary: This part closes East Blue with a storm-driven escape and the crew’s first real step toward the Grand Line.
